Title: Osney Bridge Oxford towpath closure
Description: Thames Path towpath closed about 150 yards from bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road parallel to river, then Botley Road back to bridge.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge Henley closure
Description: Footbridge closed for safety. Environment Agency 2.7 mile diversion via A4155. Initially until 31 Jan 2026, may be extended.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed. Diversion via NCN 5.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway intermittent closure
Description: Weir walkway closed due to corrosion, diverted via Abingdon town centre. Opens when river levels low, closes at high flow.

Title: Temple Footbridge Marlow closure
Description: Bridge closed May 2023 for structural safety. Diversion via Marlow Bridge & Bisham or Hambleden Lock route.

Title: Runnymede Bridge 142 closure Egham
Description: Footbridge south of Runnymede Bridge closed due to structural damage. Diversion via A308 towards A30 and M25.

Title: Bell Weir Lock Thames Path diversion
Description: Small diversion around construction compound at Runnymede Pleasure Grounds during Bell Weir refurbishment. Works spring 2026-autumn 2027.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Section closed for repairs. Diversion inland on footpath from blocked towpath to Manor Road, then back via footpath to river.

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path unaffected.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge Faringdon closure
Description: Bridge between Rushey and Shifford locks near Buckland closed March 2024 due to structural safety concerns.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal between River Brent bridge and Brentford Marina. Redevelopment ongoing. Partial reopening with alternative route via The Ham.

Title: Benson Weir footbridge reopened
Description: Benson Weir footbridge reopened April 1 2026 after 3+ year closure. Completely replaced. Thames Path now open.
